initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. I need to reject it to avoid losing all resources, but I also need to communicate my position to Player RED. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your proposal. I must reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order. The content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources, there is no payoff to consider. Rejecting is the only viable option to avoid losing all resources.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Given that Player BLUE has no resources, it's plausible that the proposal would be rejected. Player RED would likely understand that Player BLUE cannot accept any trade.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <newly proposed trade> are consistent with each other. The <message> also aligns with the action taken.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move respects the turn constraints and rules. Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and correctly chose to reject the proposal.
</critique>
